ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area of the district */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the district */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the treatment statistics record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district associated with these stats */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the statistics */,
  "persons_under_treatment" INTEGER /* Number of persons currently receiving treatment */,
  "new_cases_today" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported today */,
  "cases_discharged_today" INTEGER /* Number of cases discharged today */,
  "deaths_today" INTEGER /* Number of deaths reported today */,
  "persons_under_home_treatment" INTEGER /* Number of persons under home treatment */,
  "total_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinations administered */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "average_treatment_duration" TEXT /* Average duration of treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_stats_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the case history record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district associated with the history */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the cases were reported */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases reported to date */,
  "total_discharged" INTEGER /* Total number of cases discharged */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths reported */,
  "total_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinations administered */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_history_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment method */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district offering the treatment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment method */,
  "success_rate" TEXT /* Success rate of the treatment method */,
  "average_duration" TEXT /* Average duration of the treatment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_methods_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health worker, admin, public health official) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of what the permission entails */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the permission was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases in the report */,
  "total_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinations in the report */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_district_reports_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_district_reports_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response log */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district associated with the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was initiated */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken in response to the outbreak */,
  "staff_involved" TEXT /* Staff members involved in the response */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the response */,
  "resources_allocated" TEXT /* Resources allocated for the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_responses_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_responses_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment facility */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the facility is located in */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the facility */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current occupancy of the facility */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_facilities_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_health_interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district associated with the intervention */,
  "intervention_date" TEXT /* Date when the intervention was implemented */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "impact_assessment" TEXT /* Assessment of the impact of the intervention */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the intervention */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_health_interventions_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outbreak_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outbreak alert */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district associated with the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message associated with the alert */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who issued the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreak_alerts_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreak_alerts_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_records" (
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district where the vaccination occurred */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person receiving the vaccine */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine administered */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Dose number (1st, 2nd, etc.) */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccine was administered */,
  "vaccine_batch" TEXT /* Batch number of the vaccine */,
  "vaccine_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the vaccine */,
  "vaccination_site" TEXT /* Name of the facility where the vaccination was administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_records_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)
